auth.invalidToken: The access token is invalid or has expired.
auth.invalidRefreshToken: The refresh token is invalid or has expired.
auth.invalidInternalToken: The internal token is not valid.
auth.invalidSiteHeader: The X-Site-Id header is not a valid site id.
auth.siteRequired: This request needs a valid X-Site-Id header for a site you have a role on.
auth.noRole: This account has not been given a role on this tenant.
auth.missingPermissions: Missing permissions: {permissions}. Your current role is {role}.
auth.refreshReused: This session has been signed out for your security. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionRevoked: This session has been signed out. Please sign in again.

validation.invalidPayload: The data you sent is not valid.
validation.invalidFields: One or more field values are not valid.

content.contentTypeNotFound: That content type does not exist on this site.
content.singletonExists: "{name}" is a singleton content type, so it can only have one entry.
content.translationExists: This page already has a {locale} translation. Edit that one instead of creating a second.
content.publishForbidden: You do not have permission to publish content.
content.draftOnly: You can only save drafts — publishing requires the Editor role or above.
content.editOwnOnly: You may only edit content you created yourself.

contentTypes.keyTaken: A content type with the key "{key}" already exists.
contentTypes.routePrefixTaken: The route prefix "{prefix}" is already used by "{name}".

media.tooLarge: The file is larger than the {limit} limit.
media.folderNameTaken: A folder called "{name}" already exists here.
media.folderCycle: A folder cannot be moved inside itself.
media.folderTooDeep: Folders can be nested {max} levels deep at most.

sites.defaultLocaleNotPublished: The default locale must be one of the site's locales.
sites.hostnameTaken: That hostname is already in use.
sites.slugTaken: A site with that slug already exists.

themes.noVersion: The theme "{key}" has no published version yet.
themes.notInstalled: That theme is not installed on this site.

plugins.noVersion: The plugin "{key}" has no published version yet.
plugins.notInstalled: That plugin is not installed on this site.
plugins.permissionNotRequested: The plugin did not request these permissions, so they cannot be granted: {permissions}.
plugins.invalidToken: The plugin token is invalid or has expired.
plugins.unknownMethod: The plugin API has no method called "{method}".
plugins.methodNotSupported: The method "{method}" is not supported yet.
plugins.scopeNotGranted: The plugin "{plugin}" has not been granted the "{scope}" permission.
plugins.invalidTables: A plugin may only create tables prefixed with "{prefix}". Refused: {tables}.
plugins.invalidHosts: A plugin may only declare real hostnames it will reach. Refused: {hosts}. Wildcards on their own, IP addresses, ports and schemes are not allowed.
plugins.noNetworkHosts: The plugin "{plugin}" was granted network access but its manifest declares no hosts, so there is nowhere it may go.
plugins.secretNotConfigured: The plugin used the secret "{secret}", but its "{setting}" setting is empty. Fill it in under the plugin's settings.
plugins.egressFailed: The plugin's request could not be completed: {reason}
plugins.egressQuotaExceeded: This site has made more than {limit} plugin requests this hour. Try again in {retryAfterSec} seconds.
plugins.egressQuotaUnavailable: Plugin requests cannot be counted right now, so they are refused. Try again shortly.

packages.tooLarge: The package is larger than the {limit} limit.
packages.unreadable: The package could not be read: {reason}
packages.invalidKind: "{kind}" is not a valid package kind.
packages.unknownPublisher: This publisher key is not registered on the marketplace. Register the publisher, and its public key, before submitting a package.
packages.invalidSignature: The publisher signature is not valid: {reason}
packages.versionImmutable: {key}@{version} already exists with different contents. Bump the version — a released version is immutable.
packages.scanRejected: The package was rejected by the malware scan: {reason}
packages.notApproved: {key}@{version} is under review ({status}) and cannot be loaded yet.

render.noActiveTheme: This site has no active theme.

marketplace.unreachable: The marketplace at {url} could not be reached: {reason}
marketplace.unverified: This package was not signed by the marketplace this instance trusts, so it was not installed: {reason}
marketplace.mismatch: The marketplace was asked for {asked} and answered with {got}. Refusing to install it.
marketplace.bundleNotFound: The marketplace has no servable bundle for {key}@{version} (HTTP {status}). It may have been revoked.
marketplace.notConfigured: No marketplace is configured. Set MARKETPLACE_URL to the registry this instance should install from.
marketplace.noPinnedKey: MARKETPLACE_PUBLIC_KEY is not configured. Without a pinned key there is nothing to verify a package against, so nothing can be installed.
marketplace.scanRejected: This package failed this instance's own security scan and was not installed: {findings}

docs.title: API documentation is off
docs.body: This instance does not serve the API documentation. That is a deliberate setting, not a fault — the API itself is running normally.
docs.hint: If you run this instance, set SWAGGER_ENABLED=true and restart cms-api to serve the docs at {path}.

users.membershipNotFound: That user does not hold that role.
users.alreadyInvited: {email} has already been invited. Withdraw that invitation first.
users.alreadyRegistered: This address already has an account. Sign in instead.
users.inviteInvalid: This invitation link is not valid. It may have been used, withdrawn, or expired.
users.inviteAlreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted. Remove the user instead.
users.wrongPassword: Your current password is not correct.
users.notYourself: You cannot do this to your own account.
users.outranked: You cannot act on someone whose role is above your own.
users.cannotGrant: You cannot grant {role} — your own role is {actorRole}.
users.needTenantWide: Only someone with a tenant-wide role can grant one.
users.notYourSite: You have no role on that site.
users.lastOwner: This is the last owner. Promote someone else first, or nobody will be able to administer this tenant.

mfa.alreadyEnabled: Two-factor authentication is already on for this account.
mfa.notEnabled: This account has no second factor.
mfa.noSetup: Start the setup first — there is no pending authenticator to confirm.
mfa.challengeExpired: This sign-in attempt has expired. Enter your password again.
mfa.tooManyAttempts: Too many wrong codes. This account will not accept a code for the next 15 minutes.
mfa.throttleUnavailable: Cannot verify a code right now. A rate limiter that cannot count cannot protect a six-digit secret, so the attempt is refused rather than waved through.

mail.notConfigured: This site has no mail server configured, so it cannot send email. An administrator sets one up in Settings → Mail.
mail.quotaExceeded: This site's plugins have sent their hourly limit of {limit} emails. The next one will be accepted in about {retryAfterSec} seconds.
mail.quotaUnavailable: The mail quota cannot be checked right now, so the send was refused. Plugin email is deliberately blocked rather than sent uncounted.
mail.cancelledByPlugin: A plugin's mail.sending filter cancelled the message before it was sent.
